dailyTasks.title: Python Basics & Syntax
dailyTasks.description: Learn variables, data types, operators, and basic syntax. Complete 2-3 exercises from Codecademy or a similar platform.

dailyTasks.title: Control Flow
dailyTasks.description: Master if statements, loops (for/while), and break/continue. Build a simple program using control flow.

dailyTasks.title: Functions & Modules
dailyTasks.description: Create custom functions, understand parameters, and explore built-in modules (e.g., math, random). Write 3 function-based projects.

dailyTasks.title: Data Structures
dailyTasks.description: Learn lists, tuples, dictionaries, and sets. Practice common operations (append, index, iterate).

dailyTasks.title: Error Handling & File I/O
dailyTasks.description: Study try/except, file handling (open/read/write). Build a program that reads a file and handles errors.

dailyTasks.title: Object-Oriented Programming
dailyTasks.description: Introduce classes, objects, and inheritance. Create a simple class-based project.

dailyTasks.title: Projects & Problem-Solving
dailyTasks.description: Build a small project (e.g., to-do list, calculator) to consolidate all concepts. Solve 2-3 LeetCode/Codewars problems.

dailyTasks.title: Advanced Topics (Optional)
dailyTasks.description: Explore lambda functions, list comprehensions, or basic APIs. Update project with advanced features.

dailyTasks.title: Projects & Problem-Solving
dailyTasks.description: Build a more complex project (e.g., weather app, quiz game). Solve 3-5 LeetCode problems.

dailyTasks.title: Projects & Problem-Solving
dailyTasks.description: Build a capstone project (e.g., data analysis, automation script). Solve 5-8 LeetCode problems.

dailyTasks.title: Review & Reinforcement
dailyTasks.description: Review all concepts. Debug common errors. Practice coding for 2 hours.

dailyTasks.title: Final Project & Code Review
dailyTasks.description: Complete a final project integrating all concepts. Have a peer review your code for feedback.

dailyTasks.title: Reflection & Next Steps
dailyTasks.description: Assess progress. Identify areas for further learning. Set goals for future Python projects.

successMetrics: Debug and fix 5+ common Python errors
Complete all daily tasks without major setbacks
challenges: Keeping motivation high after difficult days
plan.motivationalApproach: Celebrate small wins daily (e.g., finishing a function, solving a problem). Use a progress tracker to visualize growth. Join Python communities (e.g., Reddit, Discord) for support. Reward yourself after milestones (e.g., a treat after 5 days of practice). Focus on progress, not perfection—every error is a learning opportunity. Remind yourself of the real-world applications (web dev, data analysis, automation) to stay inspired.
